title: WOS API Reports
description: Public API resource schema for WOS report runs. A report run is a typed analytical query parameterised by a closed reportType; runs accrete monotonically and are cursor-paginated. Report runs project governance, AI oversight, equity, and operational telemetry into the public API surface; they are derived read models, not authoritative audit records.

WorkflowUrl.description: Author-time WOS workflow document URL the report scopes to. Omitted to scope across all visible workflows.

TimeRange.description: Inclusive UTC RFC 3339 time interval used by report inputs to bound the data set.

start.description: Inclusive UTC RFC 3339 lower bound for the report's data window.

end.description: Inclusive UTC RFC 3339 upper bound for the report's data window.

ReportType.description: Closed report-type taxonomy with vendor-prefixed extension literals. Each reserved literal binds a fixed input shape and a fixed row shape; the report-run schema projects governance, AI oversight, equity, and operational concerns into named report types rather than an open string. Vendor-extension literals are reserved at the wire layer per ADR 0082 D-15 step 2 amendment but are NOT accepted by the v1 input/row contract — extension reports ship their own `schemas/api/<resource>.schema.json` rather than overloading this one.

ReportStatus.description: Lifecycle status for a report run. Closed enum: pending (queued, not yet started), running (executing), succeeded (completed with rows), failed (terminated with error), cancelled (caller cancelled before completion).

ReportOutputFormat.description: Closed output-format taxonomy for exported report runs. JSON is always available; CSV and parquet are produced on demand via the export endpoint.

AggregationGranularity.description: Closed time-bucket granularity for time-series report inputs. Bucket boundaries are aligned to UTC calendar units.

DecisionDriftInput.description: Input parameters for the decision-drift report. Computes per-bucket reviewer override rates and AI confidence trends over the requested time window.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the decision-drift input variant.

workflowUrl.description: Author-time workflow URL to scope the report to. Omit to span all visible workflows.

timeRange.description: UTC time window over which decision-drift metrics are computed.

granularity.description: Time-bucket size for the trend series.

agentId.description: Optional agent URN to restrict the report to a single declared agent.

SlaPerformanceInput.description: Input parameters for the SLA performance report. Computes per-task-pattern SLA compliance, breaches, and time-to-decision distributions.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the SLA performance input variant.

workflowUrl.description: Author-time workflow URL to scope the report to. Omit to span all visible workflows.

timeRange.description: UTC time window over which SLA metrics are computed.

taskPattern.description: Optional task pattern name from the governance task catalogue (Governance S9.1) to scope the report to one task family.

EquityDisparityInput.description: Input parameters for the equity-disparity report. Projects equity-config disparity calculations (Equity Config S3) into a public read model over the requested time window.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the equity-disparity input variant.

workflowUrl.description: Author-time workflow URL whose equity-config supplies protected categories and disparity methods.

timeRange.description: UTC time window over which disparity metrics are computed.

protectedCategoryId.description: Identifier of the equity-config protected category to evaluate. MUST match a protectedCategories[].id declared on the targeted workflow's equity config.

disparityMethodId.description: Optional identifier selecting one of the equity-config disparityMethods. When omitted, the equity config's default method is used.

CaseloadSummaryInput.description: Input parameters for the caseload-summary report. Counts open and closed instances grouped by lifecycle outcome and optional workflow scope.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the caseload-summary input variant.

workflowUrl.description: Author-time workflow URL to scope the report to. Omit to span all visible workflows.

timeRange.description: UTC time window over which caseload counts are aggregated.

groupByOutcome.description: When true, rows are partitioned by terminal outcomeCode (Kernel S6 final-state outcomeCode). When false or omitted, rows aggregate across outcomes.

AiOverrideRateInput.description: Input parameters for the AI override-rate report. Counts reviewer overrides of agent decisions per agent over the requested time window.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the AI override-rate input variant.

workflowUrl.description: Author-time workflow URL to scope the report to. Omit to span all visible workflows.

timeRange.description: UTC time window over which override counts are aggregated.

agentId.description: Optional agent URN to restrict the report to a single declared agent.

TimerBreachInput.description: Input parameters for the timer-breach report. Lists kernel timer expirations and hold breaches over the requested time window (Kernel S9 timers, Governance S5 holds).

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the timer-breach input variant.

workflowUrl.description: Author-time workflow URL to scope the report to. Omit to span all visible workflows.

timeRange.description: UTC time window over which timer-breach events are gathered.

ReviewerEngagementInput.description: Input parameters for the reviewer-engagement report. Computes per-reviewer agreement rates and review depth signals (drift-monitor agreement-rate floor, AI Integration §13).

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the reviewer-engagement input variant.

workflowUrl.description: Author-time workflow URL to scope the report to. Omit to span all visible workflows.

timeRange.description: UTC time window over which engagement metrics are computed.

reviewerId.description: Optional reviewer actor reference to restrict the report to a single reviewer.

AgentShadowModeDivergenceInput.description: Input parameters for the agent-shadow-mode-divergence report (advanced/advanced-governance.md shadow mode; advanced-governance.md:370-385). Counts and characterises divergence between the shadow agent's outputs and the baseline (human reviewer or production model) over the requested time window.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the agent-shadow-mode-divergence input variant.

workflowUrl.description: Author-time workflow URL to scope the report to. Omit to span all visible workflows.

timeRange.description: UTC time window over which divergence comparisons are aggregated.

agentId.description: Optional agent URN to restrict the report to a single shadow agent.

ReportInput.description: Closed discriminated union over reportType. Each reserved reportType binds a fixed input shape; vendor-extension reportType literals are not accepted by this contract version because the input shape would be unspecified (ADR 0082 D-15 step 2 amendment retains the closed-on-input posture even as the wire `ReportType` enum admits vendor extensions for forward-compat URN minting).

DecisionDriftRow.description: Per-bucket result row for the decision-drift report.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the decision-drift row variant.

bucketStart.description: UTC RFC 3339 inclusive lower bound of the time bucket this row represents.

agentId.description: Agent URN this row is attributed to. Omitted on cross-agent aggregate rows.

decisionsCount.description: Number of agent decisions observed in this bucket.

overrideCount.description: Number of reviewer overrides recorded in this bucket.

overrideRate.description: Reviewer override rate in [0,1] for this bucket.

averageConfidence.description: Mean reported agent confidence across decisions in this bucket. Omitted when no decisions carry confidence.

SlaPerformanceRow.description: Per-task-pattern result row for the SLA performance report.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the SLA performance row variant.

taskPattern.description: Task pattern name (Governance S9.1) this row aggregates.

totalCount.description: Total tasks in this pattern within the window.

withinSlaCount.description: Tasks completed within their declared SLA.

breachedCount.description: Tasks that breached their declared SLA.

complianceRate.description: Within-SLA compliance rate in [0,1] for this task pattern.

p50DurationSeconds.description: Median time-to-decision in seconds for this task pattern.

p95DurationSeconds.description: 95th-percentile time-to-decision in seconds for this task pattern.

EquityDisparityRow.description: Per-protected-group result row for the equity-disparity report.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the equity-disparity row variant.

protectedCategoryId.description: Equity-config protected-category identifier this row belongs to.

groupId.description: Identifier for one group within the protected category.

disparityMethodId.description: Identifier of the equity-config disparityMethod that produced disparityScore for this group.

decisionsCount.description: Number of decisions observed for this group within the window.

favourableRate.description: Rate of favourable outcomes in [0,1] for this group.

disparityScore.description: Disparity score produced by the selected disparity method. Sign and scale depend on the method; consult the equity-config disparityMethod definition.

remediationTriggered.description: True when the row crossed an equity-config remediationTrigger threshold.

CaseloadSummaryRow.description: Per-bucket or per-outcome result row for the caseload-summary report.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the caseload-summary row variant.

outcomeCode.description: Final-state outcomeCode (Kernel S6) when groupByOutcome was true. Omitted on aggregate rows.

openCount.description: Number of instances open at the end of the window for this row.

closedCount.description: Number of instances closed within the window for this row.

newlyOpenedCount.description: Number of instances newly created within the window for this row.

AiOverrideRateRow.description: Per-agent result row for the AI override-rate report.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the AI override-rate row variant.

agentId.description: Agent URN this row is attributed to.

decisionsCount.description: Number of agent decisions observed within the window.

overrideCount.description: Number of reviewer overrides recorded for this agent within the window.

overrideRate.description: Reviewer override rate in [0,1] for this agent.

TimerBreachRow.description: Per-event result row for the timer-breach report.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the timer-breach row variant.

instanceId.description: Case instance URN whose timer or hold breached.

breachedAt.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp of the breach event.

breachKind.description: Closed source of the breach event. timer-fired is a kernel timer expiration; hold-expired is a governance hold expiry.

timerId.description: Timer URN when breachKind is timer-fired.

holdId.description: Hold URN when breachKind is hold-expired.

ReviewerEngagementRow.description: Per-reviewer result row for the reviewer-engagement report.

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the reviewer-engagement row variant.

reviewerId.description: Reviewer actor reference this row is attributed to.

reviewsCount.description: Number of reviews completed within the window.

agreementRate.description: Rate at which the reviewer agreed with agent recommendations in [0,1].

averageReviewSeconds.description: Mean time spent per review in seconds.

engagementFlagged.description: True when agreementRate exceeded the drift-monitor agreement-rate floor configured for the workflow.

AgentShadowModeDivergenceRow.description: Per-agent result row for the agent-shadow-mode-divergence report (advanced/advanced-governance.md shadow mode; advanced-governance.md:370-385).

reportType.description: Discriminator literal selecting the agent-shadow-mode-divergence row variant.

agentId.description: Agent URN this row is attributed to.

baselineModelIdentifier.description: Identifier of the baseline the shadow agent was compared against (`human` for human-reviewer baseline, otherwise a model identifier). Open identifier — projected from the agent's `shadowMode.baselineModelIdentifier`.

comparisonsCount.description: Number of shadow-vs-baseline comparisons observed within the window.

divergenceCount.description: Number of comparisons whose normalized disagreement exceeded the agent's `shadowMode.divergenceThreshold`.

divergenceRate.description: Divergence rate in [0,1] for this agent within the window — `divergenceCount / comparisonsCount`.

averageDivergenceMagnitude.description: Mean normalized disagreement magnitude across diverging comparisons. Method-specific units; consult the workflow's shadow-mode declaration.

ReportRow.description: Closed discriminated union over reportType. Each reserved reportType binds a fixed row shape; the row reportType MUST match the parent run reportType.

ReportFailure.description: Failure detail attached to a report run when status is failed.

wosErrorCode.description: Stable WOS error code from the public error registry that classifies this failure.

ReportRun.description: A WOS report run resource. The run envelope is reportType-agnostic; reportType variation is confined to the input and rows discriminated unions.

id.description: Stable public URN for this report run.

reportType.description: Closed report-type taxonomy literal. MUST equal input.reportType and (when rows are present) rows[*].reportType.

input.description: Closed parameterisation of the run discriminated by reportType.

queuedAt.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when the run was accepted onto the queue.

maxDurationSeconds.description: REQUIRED resolved timeout ceiling in seconds applied to this run. Server-stamped at queue time so callers can see what was applied: equals `CreateReportRunRequest.maxDurationSeconds` when supplied (clamped to the per-deployment ceiling), otherwise the server default (3600 seconds). Exceeding this ceiling at runtime transitions the run to `status == failed` with `failure.wosErrorCode == "WOS-1408"` and the runner records a `reportTimedOut` Facts-tier provenance literal with typed timeout payload.

startedAt.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when execution began. Omitted while pending.

completedAt.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when the run reached a terminal status. Omitted while pending or running.

rowCount.description: Total result-row count when status is succeeded. Omitted otherwise.

failure.description: Failure detail when status is failed. Omitted otherwise.

ReportRunListOptions.description: Query fields for listing report runs.

reportType.description: Optional reportType filter. When supplied, only runs of that type are returned.

cursor.description: Opaque resume token returned by the previous page.

limit.description: Maximum number of runs requested for this page.

ReportRunPage.description: Cursor-paginated report-run page. Runs are returned newest-first by queuedAt.

cursor.description: Opaque token for the next page. Omitted when hasMore is false.

hasMore.description: True when another page is available from the server.

ReportRowPage.description: Cursor-paginated row page for a succeeded report run. The runId and reportType anchor every row to a single run.

runId.description: Report-run URN this page belongs to.

reportType.description: Report-type literal shared by every row in this page.

items.description: Row items in this page; each row's reportType MUST match the page reportType.

cursor.description: Opaque token for the next page. Omitted when hasMore is false.

hasMore.description: True when another row page is available from the server.

CreateReportRunRequest.description: Request body for queuing a new report run. The input discriminator selects the report shape; the server rejects vendor-extension reportType literals at this version.

input.description: Closed parameterisation of the requested run.

maxDurationSeconds.description: Optional caller-supplied timeout ceiling in seconds for this run. Reports can scan up to `maxResults: 100000` rows, so a stuck runner must not stay `running` indefinitely; this ceiling bounds wall-clock execution. The server enforces a default of 3600 seconds when omitted; callers MAY raise it up to 86400 seconds (24 hours) -- the server applies a per-deployment ceiling and clamps higher requests downward without rejection. The resolved value is server-stamped on the resulting `ReportRun.maxDurationSeconds` so callers can see what was applied. Exceeding the ceiling at runtime transitions the run to `status == failed` with `failure.wosErrorCode == "WOS-1408"` (timeout exceeded).

CancelReportRunRequest.description: Request body for cancelling a pending or running report run. An empty body is acceptable; reason is optional context.

reason.description: Optional human-readable cancellation reason recorded with the run.
